subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! In the temple of the world a hundred thousand festering wounds are manifest, and in the breast of horizons and nations wounds lie deep [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در هیکل عالم صدهزار ز جرح ناسور موجود و در جگرگاه آفاق و امم زخم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
